definition:
A man of the tribe of Levi  living at the time of Exile and Return, only mentioned at 1Ch.9.16; 
 father of: Asa (H0609H)
 § Elkanah = "God has possessed" or "God has created"
1) Samuel's father
2) a ruler in Jerusalem in the time of king Ahaz
3) one of David's mighty warriors
4) son of Korah
5) several Levites
